80010.name: Forked Passageway
80010.description: The wide, sandy passage forks here. One branch leads northeast, dropping deeper into the earth. A second rises to the southeast, climbing rapidly toward a faint yellow light. The third branch stops short at an underground river to the northwest. The steep, slick banks offer no purchase, and the rapid waters promise a swift death to those foolish enough to brave them.

80011.name: Sandy Portal
80011.description: You stand in a wide, sandy passage, which turns here from the southwest to the east as it descends into the earth. Several dark scratches are visible in one section of the wall. A short distance to the east, the passage opens out into a cavern filled with a warm green light. To the southwest, the passage ends on meeting a second passage.

80012.name: Narrow Strip of Sand
80012.description: A narrow strip of sand beneath your feet cuts through an underground pool and into a vast cavern. A miniature universe of stars and galaxies, in varying shades of green, dot the roof of the cavern high above. In this subterranean realm, their light suffices to guide your steps across the sand. Dark shapes dart about beneath the still surface of the water to the north and south, and others dance across the sand beyond the pool to the north. The sand continues into the cavern to the east and returns to darkness just west of here.

80013.name: Shallow Pool
80013.description: Still, cold water rises to your waist in this underground pool. Despite the clarity of the water and the placidity of the surface, your eyes refuse to focus on the long, thin shapes shifting and waving about the dark, rocky bottom of the pool. The pool continues to the east, and a sandy beach rises to the north. To the south and west rise sheer stone walls that join the glowing roof of the cavern high above.

80014.name: Shallow Pool
80014.description: You stand knee-deep in cold water beneath a spotted green sky. The dark rocks on the pool floor scratch at your feet and legs, and from time to time a drop of water splashes onto you from above. The pool deepens to the west. Pebbled beaches rise to the north and east, and a narrow bar of sand separates your pool from another, similar one in the south end of the cavern.

80015.name: Sandy Cavern
80015.description: The pebbly sand crunches beneath your feet as you travel through this twilit cavern far below the city. You view everything through a soft green lens, from stones to crabs to insects. Even your skin has taken on a greenish cast, although perhaps it's merely nausea. A narrow strip of sand leads away to the south, threading its way between two pools of still water toward the edge of or walk across the cavern floor to the north or east.

80016.name: Sandy Cavern
80016.description: You stand in the corner of a great cavern, which stretches away to the west and north. A pebbly sand supports your weight, and a rocky ceiling strewn with glowing green lights enfolds you from above. Reflected light some distance to the west brings you attention to the pools that fill the southern portion of the cavern. From where you stand, you can travel only north or west.

80017.name: Narrow Strip of Sand
80017.description: A sheer wall of light brown stone juts upward to your east, arcing above your head as the roof of the huge cavern in which you stand. An array of phosphorescent green lights mounted on the stone high above illuminates the coarse sand beneath your feet and highlights the larger stones scattered about the sands to the north. A placid pool borders the sand on the south, and another begins just west of here, reducing the pebbly sand to a narrow strip.

80018.name: Shallow Pool
80018.description: Cold water engulfs your lower body as you tread carefully among the rocks at the bottom of this underground pool. The water deepens to the east, while the pool floor climbs up to a sandy beach to the north. To the south and west rise the walls of the cavern.

80019.name: Shallow Pool
80019.description: The water in this portion of the pool rises nearly to your neck, and you struggle to avoid slipping on the rocks and plunging fully below the surface. The pool becomes more shallow to the west, where the water meets the western wall of the cavern near the entry passage. A narrow strip of sand separates this pool from another to the north. Looking carefully into the water, you think you spot the entrance to a tunnel.

80020.name: Sandy Cavern
80020.description: You stand at the edge of a great cavern beneath the city of Mareldja. A few meters to the west, a rough jumble of broken stone climbs upward to the base of the cavern's arched ceiling. Patches of phosphorescent lichen speckle the stone high above you, filling the space around you with a gentle green glow. The floor of the cavern is covered with sand, leading you to suspect that the cavern once opened onto the sea beyond the rubble to the west. The cavern opens to the east.

80021.name: Sandy Cavern
80021.description: High above you, green shapes pulse slowly in a dark sky, illuminating the area with their phosphorescent glow. Crabs and insects move rapidly about the area, and from time to time you realize that you have mistaken another large grey lizard for a stone. Sand leads toward the edges of the cavern to the north, east, and west, and the sand descends quickly into a quiet pool to the south.

80022.name: Sandy Cavern
80022.description: You stand in the center of the cavern, where the ceiling is highest and the light most dim. The sand slopes down to the south, falling below the surface of a small subterranean pool. It continues in all other directions--north, east, and west--toward the cavern walls.

80023.name: Sandy Cavern
80023.description: Green nebulae floating high above light your way through a realm of sand stretching away on all sides. The soft sound of running water beckons you to the southwest, and periodically you spot a crab or lizard scurrying about in the sand.

80024.name: Sandy Cavern
80024.description: The walls of the cavern rise to the north and east, but the cavern opens out to the west and south. From this vantage point, you can see that the green ceiling lights are merely patches of phosphorescent lichen. Huge insects dart around the patches, feeding on each other and on smaller varieties beyond the power of your vision.

80025.name: Sandy Cavern
80025.description: From this vantage point, you view the entire cavern spreading out to the south, dusted with sand below and bejewelled with emeralds above. The crabs seem to dance rhythmically, snapping their pincers and twirling about on their long legs. The beige stone from which the cavern was formed rises up behind you, bending from the southwest to the east, while the caverns invites you to south.

80026.name: Sandy Cavern
80026.description: Here at the northern edge of the great cavern, a small, flat shelf of stone juts from the wall. The formation appears to be natural, but serves well as both table and bench. The sand near the wall becomes more akin to gravel, with large chunks of stone mixed in among the smaller pebbles. The wall continues east and west, blocking movement to the north, and the cavern opens to the south.

80027.name: Sandy Cavern
80027.description: The northern wall of the cavern curves from west to southeast here, forming a border of stone at what is perhaps the highest point in the cavern floor. Insects buzz past you incessantly, yet through strange acoustic mysteries, you hear the bubbling of a stream from across the cavern to the south.
